title: Runtime Validation, Parsing, and Trust Boundaries · Type-System Trace: Parser Contracts
summary: Parse API, storage, URL, form, and message values into trustworthy domain records without unsafe casts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts parser contracts increment in a runtime-validated public data adapter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build parsers that return typed values or structured failure paths rather than booleans that discard evidence.
Receive external JSON, storage, DOM, environment, and message data as unknown until evidence narrows it.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Separate compile-time claims from runtime facts, narrow every external unknown with executable evidence, inspect diagnostics and emitted JavaScript, then test a changed schema without assertions or suppression. Apply that move specifically to Parser Contracts while producing a runtime-validated public data adapter.
